compiled_state.title: [test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh]: pre-existing failure -> validate.sh --ci flagged
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

tests/.../test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails when run via validate.sh / test-batched.sh.

## Symptom
plugin scripts contain relative paths

## Reproduction
bash tests/[hooks|scripts|integration]/test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh

## Context
Discovered while running validate.sh --ci to unblock scripts/release.sh.
CI on origin/main is GREEN. After fix 7225-7708 (bash-runner.sh honors
SUITE_TEST_INDEX RED markers), the failure remains because no RED marker
exists for these specific function-level failures.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause verified: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT fallback lines in bash-runner.sh (147, 160) split variable assignment from ../.. expression for SC2155, severing the test's CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT literal exclusion match. Existing test serves as RED test.
comments.author: Test
